creator: mistral@imasy.or.jp
text:
Sorry, I dropped diff for files/patch-ad

Here is the diff for files/patch-ad:

--- files/patch-ad.orig Wed Dec 26 12:10:38 2001
+++ files/patch-ad Wed Dec 26 12:15:29 2001
@@ -36,7 +36,7 @@
MakeDir($(LIBDIR)/ja_JP.EUC/app-defaults)
$(INSTALL) -c $(INSTAPPFLAGS) XCal-uj.ad $(LIBDIR)/ja_JP.EUC/app-default
s/XCalendar
+ MakeDir($(XCALENDAR_JP_LIBDIR))
-+ $(INSTALL) -c $(INSTAPPFLAGS) $(FILESDIR)/xcalendar.hol $(XCALENDAR_JP_L
IBDIR)
++ $(INSTALL) -c $(INSTAPPFLAGS) $(FILESDIR)/xcalendar-uj.hol $(XCALENDAR_J
P_LIBDIR)/xcalendar.hol
+ $(INSTALL) -c $(INSTAPPFLAGS) xcalendar-uj.hlp $(XCALENDAR_JP_LIBDIR)/xc
alendar.hlp
+ $(INSTALL) -c $(INSTMANFLAGS) xcalendar-uj.man \
+ $(MANPATH)/ja/man1/xcalendar.1
